extracted_claim.claim_summary: The customer claims the package and its label sustained water damage, rendering the label unreadable.

image_assessments.notes: Close-up of a wet cardboard package with water droplets on the box surface and the shipping label. The label is readable.
Extreme close-up of the shipping label with water droplets. The label text is clearly readable.
A person holding a wet package in the rain. The package box and label show water droplets. The label is readable.

result.user_claim: Customer: Delivery box got wet. | Support: Is the label affected too? | Customer: Yes, the label became unreadable because of the water. | Support: Are you claiming contents damage? | Customer: No, wet box and unreadable label.
result.evidence_standard_met_reason: At least one image shows the claimed label with sufficient clarity to evaluate the claim.
result.claim_status_justification: Images confirm the claimed label with visible water_damage. Supporting images: img_1;img_2;img_3.
